response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine breadth — ~20 years of polyglot engineering, a founder track record, and recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work — but the role calls for director-level AI strategy at a recognized-expert level, and the resume does not support that. AI work appears only in the most recent position with no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, no cloud architecture depth, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no history of advising strategic customers or shaping organizational AI direction. The experience profile skews toward senior individual contributor craft rather than the thought-leadership and external-advisory posture this principal-level role demands.
strengths: Nearly 20 years of continuous hands-on engineering across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and data-intensive systems — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum.
Entrepreneurial track record with Northwind Labs and multiple open-source platforms, demonstrating builder and founder instincts the role prefers.
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work in current role shows timely pivot toward agentic infrastructure and practical AI integration.
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — confined to one job entry with no shipped AI products, published research, or externally recognized contributions in the space.
No evidence of strategic advisory work: the resume contains no customer-facing influence, partner engagement, or internal thought-leadership at director scope.
Cloud depth is limited to AWS CDK usage in one role; the position requires fluency with cloud platform strategy at a level not reflected anywhere in the resume.
